summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink PWA super app completed. Backend APIs mostly functional (84% success rate), frontend UI/UX excellent with successful auth flow and navigation. Main issues are with CREATE operations returning 520 errors.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when creating posts
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot create posts or stories

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when creating listings
Returns 520 Internal Server Error when creating properties
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot create rental property listings

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when creating services

integration_issues.issue: Create post functionality may fail due to backend 520 errors

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Register page form validation and account creation
User registration flow with redirect to feed
Feed page loads with stories, quick links, and bottom navigation
Games page with all three games (Spin Wheel, Scratch Card, Memory Match)
Wallet page with balance display and transactions
Marketplace page with categories and listings display
Profile page with user info and BL Coins
Direct navigation to all main pages works
BL Coins system working (100 welcome bonus visible)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix 520 Internal Server Error for all CREATE operations (posts, listings, properties, services). This appears to be a server-side issue, possibly related to database write operations or server configuration. All READ operations work perfectly.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (UI/UX excellent, only create operations affected by backend issues)
